word: H2521 - חֶלְקַת הַצֻּרִים - Chelqath hats-Tsurîym - khel-kath' hatstsoo-reem' - Helkath-hazzurim

sections.paragraph:
Original: חלקת הצּרים

Transliteration: chelqath hatstsûrı̂ym

Phonetic: khel-kath' hats-tsoo-reem'

BDB Definition:

Helkath-hazzurim = "field of swords"
  1. a place near the pool of Gibeon where Ishbosheth's men were killed by David's men under Joab

Origin: from H2520 and the pl. of H6697, with the article inserted

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
